class.name: tool_line_follower_controller/ToolLineFollowerController
class.description: Cross-track PID controller using only a configurable TF frame position (gps_link by default, set gps_frame_id to tool_link for implement-point following). No heading used. Steering = -PID(cross_track_error).

class.name: tool_arc_follower_controller/ToolArcFollowerController
class.description: Extends ToolLineFollowerController with Menger curvature feed-forward for smooth arc following even at zero cross-track error.

class.name: tool_rpp_controller/ToolAnchoredRPPController
class.description: RPP controller anchored to a configurable TF frame (gps_frame_id, default gps_link). Set gps_frame_id to tool_link to keep the implement hitch point on arc paths using dual-antenna heading for orientation.
